data.content: Implemented history prompt visibility so every prompt appears with Prompt # and workflow state/step context. Added promptNumber/workflowState to parsed prompt entries from beat_state(before_prompt), surfaced metadata in interaction picker and conversation rows, and updated API schema/types/tests. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test all pass. bun run build fails on current main baseline due existing prerender key/useContext issue on /_global-error and /beads.
